home.hero_subtitle: Reliable agricultural knowledge and insights — from government schemes and weather forecasts to crop guidance and market prices.
home.weather_desc: Weather is the single biggest factor affecting crop success. Our Weather Advisory tool gives you real-time conditions — temperature, rainfall probability, and wind speed — so you can decide the right day to sow, spray, or irrigate.
home.weather_why1_desc: Know the right window to plant before rains arrive or dry spells hit.
home.weather_why2_desc: Avoid waste — only spray pesticides when wind and humidity are ideal.
home.weather_why3_desc: Skip watering when rain is forecast. Save water, save cost.
home.stats_subtitle: Accurate agricultural data to help farmers make well-informed decisions every season.
home.stats_c1_desc: Explore production volumes across crops and regions with clear, accessible breakdowns for every farmer.
home.stats_c2_desc: Understand nutrient levels and soil conditions with practical guidance for healthier, more productive fields.
home.stats_c3_desc: Learn from seasonal yield patterns across regions to better plan your next crop cycle.
home.stats_c4_desc: Stay informed on historical and current crop prices so you can choose the best time to sell.
home.challenges_subtitle: Agriculture today is more complex than ever. Farmers deserve access to the right knowledge at the right time.
home.ch1_desc: Shifting climate patterns demand timely weather forecasts and adaptive crop planning to protect livelihoods.
home.ch2_desc: Soil degradation and pest resistance call for updated farming techniques and research-backed crop guidance.
home.ch3_desc: Unpredictable price swings make access to current market information essential for confident selling decisions.
home.ch4_desc: Many farmers miss out on government subsidies and welfare programs simply due to lack of accessible information.
home.modern_subtitle: Bringing farmers closer to trusted knowledge — from university research and KVK advisories to weather data and sustainable farming practices.
home.link1_desc: Get real-time farming advice and updates directly via SMS from agricultural experts.
home.link2_desc: Access accurate weather forecasts, rainfall data, and alerts to plan your farming activities.
home.link3_desc: Check eligibility, registration status, and benefits under the PM-Kisan income support scheme.
home.link4_desc: View daily mandi prices, market trends, and commodity data across India.
home.link5_desc: Explore research, technologies, and advancements in agriculture from ICAR.
home.res1_desc: Get real-time farming advice and updates directly via SMS from agricultural experts.
home.res2_desc: Access accurate weather forecasts, rainfall data, and alerts to plan your farming activities.
home.res3_desc: Check eligibility, registration status, and benefits under the PM-Kisan income support scheme.
home.res4_desc: View daily mandi prices, market trends, and commodity data across India.
home.res5_desc: Explore research, technologies, and advancements in agriculture from ICAR.
home.card1_desc: Access weather updates, market prices, plant protection tips, and advisory services for farmers.
home.card2_desc: Online trading platform for agricultural commodities connecting farmers to buyers across India.
home.card3_desc: Insurance scheme providing financial protection to farmers against crop loss due to natural calamities.
home.card4_desc: Central platform providing government agricultural services, schemes, and farmer support.
home.cardFindings_desc: View all these findings at one place.
home.guides_subtitle: Curated agricultural knowledge from trusted institutions, universities, and research bodies across India.
home.g1_desc: Research-backed crop practices and seasonal farming guides from India's leading agricultural institutions.
home.g2_desc: Official advisories, scheme announcements, and policy updates directly from central and state authorities.
home.g3_desc: Scientific studies, field trials, and innovations driving the future of sustainable agriculture in India.
home.g4_desc: Regional farming guidance and practical field-level knowledge tailored to local crops and conditions.
home.schemes_subtitle: Stay informed about central and state agricultural initiatives, subsidies, and farmer welfare programs designed to support you.
home.s1_desc: Explore ongoing agriculture development programs and farmer welfare initiatives from across India.
home.s2_desc: Discover financial assistance available for seeds, equipment, fertilizers, and modern farming tools.
home.s3_desc: Understand protection schemes designed to safeguard farmers against crop failure, drought, and losses.
home.s4_desc: Step-by-step information on eligibility checks, required documents, and how to apply for schemes.
home.cta_subtitle: Explore CropYaan's free knowledge hub — from government schemes and crop advisories to market prices and weather insights, all in one place.

about.hero_subtitle: A platform built to give farmers direct access to the knowledge, tools, and information they need — without intermediaries.
about.who_content: Cropyaan is a digital platform designed for Indian farmers. It brings together crop guidance, weather advisories, government scheme information, and market data into a single, accessible place. We are not an agricultural company. We do not sell products or inputs. We provide structured, reliable information to help farmers make informed decisions about their land and livelihood.
about.mission_content: Farming decisions are time-sensitive and consequential. Yet access to accurate, actionable information has historically been uneven — concentrated in extension services, research institutions, or urban centres that many farmers cannot easily reach. Cropyaan exists to close that gap. Our mission is to make agricultural knowledge freely and simply available to every farmer, regardless of location or digital literacy.
about.vision_content: We are building toward a future where no farming decision is made in an information vacuum. Our immediate goals are to expand language coverage across Indian regional languages, deepen the quality and locality of weather and soil data, and make government scheme information easier to understand and act on. Over time, we intend for Cropyaan to become the most trusted source of practical agricultural information in India.
about.closing: Cropyaan is built with farmers, for farmers. We measure our progress by how useful we are to the people working the land.

hiw.hero_subtitle: CropYaan puts reliable agricultural knowledge in every farmer's hands — from crop guidance and weather updates to government schemes and market prices.
hiw.step1_desc: Farmers browse crop-specific guides, seasonal farming practices, and agricultural resources curated from universities, KVKs, and research institutions.
hiw.step2_desc: Farmers view localised weather forecasts to plan sowing schedules, irrigation cycles, and harvesting windows with greater confidence.
hiw.step3_desc: Farmers learn about central and state subsidies, crop insurance programs, and welfare initiatives — with step-by-step guidance on how to apply.
hiw.step4_desc: Farmers monitor live and historical mandi prices across regions to decide the best time and location to sell their produce for maximum returns.
hiw.step5_desc: With reliable knowledge from CropYaan, farmers improve crop planning, reduce losses, and build more productive and sustainable farming practices.
hiw.closing_subtitle: Every resource on CropYaan is chosen to reduce uncertainty and give farmers the confidence to plan smarter — across every season, every crop, and every region.

weather.hero_subtitle: Enter your location to get current weather conditions and tailored farming advice for your fields.
weather.placeholder: Enter city or district name (e.g. Pune, Warangal, Nashik)
weather.error_not_found: Location not found. Please try a different city name.
weather.error_fetch: Unable to fetch weather data. Please check your connection and try again.
weather.footer_note: Weather data sourced from Open-Meteo. Advisories are general guidance — consult your local KVK or agricultural officer for crop-specific recommendations.
weather.adv_rain_text: Rainfall likely. Consider delaying irrigation and avoid applying fertilizers that may wash away.
weather.adv_heat_text: Extreme heat detected. Ensure crops receive adequate water and consider shade netting for sensitive plants.
weather.adv_wind_text: High wind speeds expected. Avoid pesticide and herbicide spraying — drift can damage crops.
weather.adv_cold_text: Cold conditions ahead. Protect frost-sensitive crops and delay sowing of warm-season varieties.
weather.adv_good_text: Weather looks good for farming activities today. Suitable for sowing, spraying, and field maintenance.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Whether you're looking to collaborate, explore partnerships, or need support, our team is here to help. We'd love to hear from you.

services.hero_subtitle: From daily weather to crop-specific advice, CropYaan puts the right information in front of you at the right time.
services.weather_desc: Farming decisions are time-sensitive. Our weather advisory gives you hyper-local forecasts so you can plan irrigation, sowing, and harvesting without second-guessing the sky.
services.weather_b1: Daily and weekly forecasts tailored to your district
services.weather_b2: Rain probability and wind alerts before critical farm operations
services.weather_b3: Smart irrigation scheduling based on live weather data
services.weather_b4: Early warnings for frost, heat stress, and unseasonal rain
services.crop_desc: Not every crop needs the same care in the same week. CropYaan delivers advice that matches your specific crop, your growth stage, and the conditions on your land right now.
services.crop_b1: Stage-by-stage guidance from sowing to harvest
services.crop_b2: Pest and disease alerts before they spread
services.crop_b3: Fertiliser and water recommendations by crop type
services.crop_b4: Market timing suggestions to reduce post-harvest losses
services.insights_desc: We are building a layer of insights that connects government crop data, market trends, and regional performance — so you have more than gut instinct to go on.
services.insights_b1: Crop price trends from mandis across the country
services.insights_b2: Government MSP updates and procurement announcements
services.insights_b3: Regional yield benchmarks to compare your performance
services.insights_b4: Soil health data overlaid with seasonal recommendations
services.chatbot_desc: Our AI assistant is built specifically for farming queries — plain language in, practical advice out.
services.chatbot_b1: Ask about pests, soil, weather, or schemes in any language
services.chatbot_b2: Responses grounded in agronomic knowledge, not generic search
services.chatbot_b3: Remembers your crop and location for personalised replies
services.chatbot_b4: Available anytime — no wait, no call centres
services.cta_subtitle: CropYaan is growing alongside the farmers who use it. More features, better data, and sharper advice — every month.
